description_long: This is a classic blue sports car with white racing stripes running from the front to the rear, evoking the style of vintage roadsters. The car features a low, aerodynamic body with pronounced wheel arches and a long hood, typical of high-performance vehicles. The open-top design reveals a two-seat interior with gray upholstery and a wooden steering wheel, emphasizing its sporty and luxurious character. The wheels are robust, with visible multi-spoke rims and thick tires suitable for high-speed driving. Chrome accents are present on the bumpers, side mirrors, and exhaust pipes, adding to its polished appearance. The rear of the car is slightly elevated, with dual exhausts and a license plate, completing its aggressive yet elegant look.
description: A classic blue open-top sports car with white racing stripes, chrome accents, and a two-seat interior. It features pronounced wheel arches, multi-spoke rims, and a sleek, aerodynamic body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated hood, open cockpit, and detailed wheel arches with visible multi-spoke rims.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual white racing stripes, rounded headlights, and aggressive front grille.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the open-top interior, wooden steering wheel, and rear fender contours.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the elevated back, dual exhausts, license plate, and the continuation of the racing stripes.
attribute_wheel_design: five-spoke alloy wheels with a classic, robust design
